Merge previously saved values onto the display data frame

Source: R/merge_existing_data.R
merge_existing_data.Rd

Left-joins existing_data onto data_df using the id column declared in row_spec. Rows in data_df with no match in existing_data receive NA for every col_spec column. Rows in existing_data that are absent from data_df are silently dropped.

Usage

merge_existing_data(data_df, existing_data, row_spec, col_spec)

Arguments

data_df

A tibble containing at least the id_col and display columns declared in row_spec.

existing_data

A tibble of previously saved values (id_col + col_spec columns), or NULL for a blank start.

row_spec

A validated row_spec list.

col_spec

A validated col_spec list.

Value

A tibble with exactly the id_col, display_cols, and col_spec columns — in that order. One row per row in data_df.
